claims.text: Reinforcement Learning in Traffic Signal Control faces significant hurdles in real-world deployment due to limited generalization to dynamic traffic flow variations.
claims.source_quote: Reinforcement Learning (RL) in Traffic Signal Control (TSC) faces significant hurdles in real-world deployment due to limited generalization to dynamic traffic flow variations.

claims.text: Existing approaches often overfit static patterns in Traffic Signal Control.
claims.source_quote: Existing approaches often overfit static patterns and use action spaces incompatible with driver expectations.

claims.text: Existing approaches use action spaces incompatible with driver expectations.
claims.source_quote: Existing approaches often overfit static patterns and use action spaces incompatible with driver expectations.

claims.text: The proposed Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning framework is validated in the Vissim traffic simulator.
claims.source_quote: This paper proposes a robust Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL) framework validated in the Vissim traffic simulator.

claims.text: The framework integrates Turning Ratio Randomization as a training strategy.
claims.source_quote: The framework integrates three mechanisms: (1) Turning Ratio Randomization, a training strategy that exposes agents to dynamic turning probabilities to enhance robustness against unseen scenarios;

claims.text: Turning Ratio Randomization exposes agents to dynamic turning probabilities.
claims.source_quote: Turning Ratio Randomization, a training strategy that exposes agents to dynamic turning probabilities to enhance robustness against unseen scenarios;

claims.text: The framework includes a stability-oriented Exponential Phase Duration Adjustment action space.
claims.source_quote: (2) a stability-oriented Exponential Phase Duration Adjustment action space, which balances responsiveness and precision through cyclical, exponential phase adjustments;

claims.text: The Exponential Phase Duration Adjustment balances responsiveness and precision through cyclical, exponential phase adjustments.
claims.source_quote: a stability-oriented Exponential Phase Duration Adjustment action space, which balances responsiveness and precision through cyclical, exponential phase adjustments;

claims.text: The framework uses a Neighbor-Based Observation scheme utilizing the MAPPO algorithm with Centralized Training with Decentralized Execution.
claims.source_quote: (3) a Neighbor-Based Observation scheme utilizing the MAPPO algorithm with Centralized Training with Decentralized Execution (CTDE).

claims.text: The approach approximates the efficacy of global observations while maintaining scalable local communication.
claims.source_quote: By leveraging centralized updates, this approach approximates the efficacy of global observations while maintaining scalable local communication.

claims.text: The framework outperforms standard RL baselines, reducing average waiting time by over 10%.
claims.source_quote: Experimental results demonstrate that our framework outperforms standard RL baselines, reducing average waiting time by over 10%.

claims.text: The proposed model exhibits superior generalization in unseen traffic scenarios.
claims.source_quote: The proposed model exhibits superior generalization in unseen traffic scenarios and maintains high control stability, offering a practical solution for adaptive signal control.

claims.text: The proposed model maintains high control stability.
claims.source_quote: The proposed model exhibits superior generalization in unseen traffic scenarios and maintains high control stability, offering a practical solution for adaptive signal control.
